intent: Improve generalization and held-out accuracy by adding label smoothing in the loss, replacing LeakyReLU with GELU activations for smoother gradients, and slightly increasing training epochs with the existing augmentation and model.

Enhance the existing CNN by adding a third convolutional block with batch normalization and dropout, increasing model capacity moderately, and introducing mild random affine data augmentation during training to improve generalization and held-out accuracy.
Improve generalization and accuracy by adding dropout, using LeakyReLU activations, and increasing epochs with a cosine annealing learning rate scheduler.
Replace the linear classifier with a small convolutional neural network using normalization, ReLU activations, Adam optimizer, and more epochs to improve accuracy.
Add simple data augmentation (random horizontal flips and random crops) plus label smoothing in the loss to improve generalization and held-out accuracy.
Add Mixup data augmentation, increase model capacity slightly, and use cosine annealing LR scheduler to improve generalization and held-out accuracy.

Enhance the convolutional network by adding an additional convolutional block, using ELU activations, label smoothing, and MixUp data augmentation with a small increase in training epochs to improve generalization and held-out accuracy.

Improve accuracy by adding MixUp data augmentation combined with the existing mild random affine transforms, switching to ELU activations for smoother gradients, adding weight normalization for faster convergence, and increasing training epochs slightly with a cosine annealing warm restart scheduler
